title: Was that lightning?
author: Brennan Hatton
variants:
HOLY WOW, was that lightning? 
Did I just get stuck into existance from lightning?

Did it bring me here?
Did I ride the lightning?

Or did I just explode in shocking existance from that?
 Woahhh wha???

Anyway, that was wild.
So I guess you the one I was given the message for..?

Theres a train ahead, get on it.
 Thats about it I guess.

Good luck!

Woah, that was a shock.
 Did that bring me here?
I LOVE when that happens
Anway...

Welcome to the Dungeon Train!
Got any questions?

Well Im just a book, so I cant hear you

This train may be the only way to get answers.
